title: Change board tabs order
excerpt: Change board tabs order, without workaround…

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @yoram.golan,

Can you please elaborate on how the ideal solution would look like to you?

Please add as much detail as possible so that our team can take a look into the request!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: yoram.golan (Yoram)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Matias, I think the best intuitive way is Drag & drop (shift the tab right or left),
but any method will be helpful.
If I’m not well understood, I refer to the top tabs on each board.
thanks!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for that @yoram.golan !

Everyone: Remember you can vote at the top of the screen!
